title: Managing Compliance
description: Work your reviewer inbox, create and review obligations with AI-evaluated evidence, build your asset hierarchy, and configure your footprint.

steps.caption: Your compliance cockpit
steps.narration: The Comply tab is your compliance cockpit — every surface where compliance work happens.

steps.caption: Reviewer inbox
steps.narration: The Reviewer inbox: every review assigned to you, across the org.

steps.caption: Obligations
steps.narration: Obligations — compliance duties pinned to assets, with evidence and sign-off.

steps.caption: Asset hierarchy
steps.narration: The Asset hierarchy: your operations tree, org down to component.

steps.caption: Footprint & compliance checkup
steps.narration: And Footprint and the Compliance checkup tune what scores your feed.

steps.caption: The reviewer inbox
steps.narration: The reviewer inbox lists every obligation waiting on you, so nothing falls through the cracks.

steps.caption: Open Obligations
steps.narration: From the Comply tab, open Obligations and create one — you pin a regulation to one of your assets.

steps.caption: Set severity & reviewer
steps.narration: Set its severity and compliance status, and assign a reviewer to complete the review.

steps.caption: Attach evidence — a photo
steps.narration: Reviewers upload evidence — here, a photograph of a corroded storage tank — and Vantage analyses each file in the background.

steps.caption: The AI reads the photo
steps.narration: Vantage's AI inspects the image and describes what it sees — severe external corrosion across the tank underside.

steps.caption: Every finding, flagged
steps.narration: It breaks the evidence into specific findings — missing inspection tags, an unprotected pipe, the limited scope of the photo — each with a suggested action.

steps.caption: You review and respond
steps.narration: The human reviewer acknowledges or responds to each finding. The AI assists — it never decides.

steps.caption: Sign off through the workflow
steps.narration: Then submit for approval and sign off, with severity, status and a full audit trail captured.

steps.caption: Open the asset hierarchy
steps.narration: From the Comply tab, open the Asset hierarchy — this is where you model your operations.

steps.caption: Your sites
steps.narration: Start with your sites — refineries, plants and platforms.

steps.caption: Add a site
steps.narration: Add a new site in a click — here, a North Sea drilling platform.

steps.caption: Seed an ISO 14224 oil & gas hierarchy
steps.narration: Rather than build it by hand, seed an industry starter pack — the ISO fourteen-two-twenty-four oil and gas taxonomy.

steps.caption: Units & equipment, auto-built
steps.narration: Vantage populates the units and equipment classes beneath the site automatically.

steps.caption: Expand and refine
steps.narration: Expand the tree to refine it — every asset can then carry its own obligations and documents.

steps.caption: Pick your role
steps.narration: Configure your operations footprint. Start with your role — Chief Compliance Officer, EHS Manager, and so on — which sets sensible defaults.

steps.caption: Your geographies
steps.narration: Choose the geographies whose regulations apply to you — the US, the EU, the Gulf, and more.

steps.caption: Industries & substances
steps.narration: Pick your industrial activities by NAICS code, and the substances you handle by CAS number.

steps.caption: Regulators, topics — then save
steps.narration: Finally choose the regulators and topics to monitor, and save. This footprint is what scores your Relevance Feed.
